prestazioni: Replace the stock 4A-FE (1.6L) or 5E-FE (1.5L) engine with a fully built 2ZZ-GE (1.8L) from the Toyota Celica GT-S, featuring a Tomei 272° camshaft, HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold, and a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with a custom 1.0 bar boost setup, paired with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping

Install a Cusco Type RS 2-way limited-slip differential with 1.5-way preload adjustment and a TRD 4.3 final gear ratio to optimize power delivery to the front wheels, complemented by a set of OS Giken 1.5-way clutch and lightweight flywheel for rapid gear engagement

Upgrade the factory MacPherson strut suspension with Tein Flex Z coilovers (specifically valved for the Cynos chassis), paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear) and Whiteline adjustable control arms to fine-tune camber and toe for aggressive cornering
estetica: Fit a Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders to accommodate wider wheels, paired with a custom front lip and rear diffuser from Rocket Bunny’s Cynos-specific aero package (PN: RB-CYN-001)

Install a set of Work Meister S1 3P 15x8.5 +30 wheels wrapped in Toyo R888R 205/50R15 tires, with custom extended wheel studs and Muteki SR48 lug nuts for a flush fitment, complemented by a custom rear spoiler from J’s Racing (PN: JSR-CYN-RS01)

Replace all exterior lighting with custom LED units from TRD, including a full LED taillight conversion (PN: TRD-52611) and a custom Hella 500 Pro fog light setup with smoked lenses, paired with a carbon fiber hood from Seibon (PN: CF-TOY-CYN-HOOD)
